post.description:
Takes a set of user credentials and returns an access and refresh JSON web
token pair to prove the authentication of those credentials.

Status0b4Enum.description:
* `DRAFT` - Draft
* `SUBMITTED` - Submitted
* `CLIENT_APPROVED` - Client Approved
* `APPROVED` - Approved
* `REJECTED` - Rejected
